scenarios.confidence_notes: Paired samples: 2 group comparisons across 2 simulator group(s).

primary_failed_gate.label: Lock-in weakened while expiry pressure rose
primary_failed_gate.rationale: This gate is driven by direct simulator deltas. Candidate output reduced lock-in while raising natural expiry.

secondary_regressions.label: Skip/rejoin edge worsened
secondary_regressions.rationale: This gate is driven by direct simulator deltas. Candidate increased the skip-heavy edge instead of pushing it toward zero.

secondary_regressions.label: Engagement gain came with excess T6 supply
secondary_regressions.rationale: This gate is driven by direct simulator deltas. Engagement gain appears coupled to excess T6 supply growth.

secondary_regressions.label: Lock-in weakened while expiry pressure rose
secondary_regressions.rationale: This gate is driven by a cross-simulator regression pattern. Candidate output reduced lock-in while raising natural expiry.

secondary_regressions.label: Engagement gain came with excess T6 supply
secondary_regressions.rationale: This gate is driven by a cross-simulator regression pattern. Engagement gain appears coupled to excess T6 supply growth.

secondary_regressions.label: Dominant archetype changed
secondary_regressions.rationale: This gate is driven by direct simulator deltas. Archetype leadership changed enough to trigger a stability concern.

interaction_ambiguity.note: 3 active knobs changed together, so the causal ranking is heuristic and interaction effects are not isolated.

confidence_notes: Paired samples: 2 group comparisons across 2 simulator group(s).
